# n8n WhatsApp AI Agent
> Importable n8n workflow for building practical WhatsApp AI agents with WAHA, Redis, OpenAI and Supabase.

## Core Files

- `workflow.json`: Sanitized n8n workflow export.
- `README.md`: Project overview, setup and contribution invitation.
- `docker-compose.yml`: Local starter stack for n8n, Redis and WAHA.
- `.env.example`: Environment variable template without real secrets.
- `SECURITY.md`: Secret handling and production security checklist.
- `ROADMAP.md`: Planned improvements and good first issues.
- `CONTRIBUTING.md`: Contribution flow.

## Key Concepts

- WhatsApp input enters through WAHA and an n8n webhook.
- Redis buffers rapid-fire messages before the AI responds.
- OpenAI handles text, image and audio understanding.
- Supabase stores conversations and messages.
- WAHA sends the response back to WhatsApp.
- Human handoff is supported through workflow logic.

## Safety Notes

- Do not commit n8n credential exports, webhook IDs, API keys or private URLs.
- Keep Redis private and protect WAHA with an API key.
- Use Supabase RLS and least-privilege credentials.
- Rotate credentials if a workflow export accidentally leaks sensitive metadata.
